reasoning: As of the knowledge cutoff date (June 5, 2025), Miami Mayor Francis Suarez has stated he is "considering" a run for Florida Governor but has not committed, acknowledging that former President Trump's endorsement of Representative Byron Donalds "makes it hard" for other candidates in the GOP primary. For this question to resolve as "Yes", Suarez would need to officially announce his candidacy within the next 26 days (before July 1, 2025). Given the steep uphill battle in a primary against a Trump-endorsed frontrunner, Suarez's low polling numbers (1-5%), and the very short remaining time window, it is highly unlikely he will formally launch a gubernatorial campaign before the July 1 deadline.
